title: Added Local Studio App To Dev Runner
summary: Updated bin/dev-studio to start the Python local Studio app server by default on 127.0.0.1:8765 while keeping Jekyll and the existing sibling services available for unmigrated Studio workflows.
effect: This lets the normal local Studio launcher own the new app surface during migration and reduces the need for a separate manual server command without prematurely removing Jekyll or old write services.
verification: Python compile checks passed for local Studio app server modules
bin/dev-studio smoke on alternate ports launched the local Studio app server
curl http://127.0.0.1:8766/health returned ok during the launcher smoke
Generated docs/search payloads were not rebuilt; source docs and docs-log indexes changed only
